FS!QRは「一時的なファイル共有」に特化したサービスです。設定された共有有効期: FS!QR is a service specialized in "temporary file sharing". Once the set sharing expiration date passes, the file data on the server is automatically and securely deleted completely. In this case, the file cannot be restored, so please ask the sender to upload it again.
共有者がセキュリティのためにパスワード保護を設定している場合、ダウンロードページ: If the sharer has enabled password protection for security, a screen asking for the "ID" and "Password" will be displayed immediately after opening the download page.
「Files by Google」アプリ、または端末にプリインストールされている: Launch the "Files by Google" app, or the "My Files" / "Files" app pre-installed on your device.

「ブラウズ」タブを選択し、「このiPhone内」または「iCloud Drive: Select the "Browse" tab and open the "Downloads" folder located in "On my iPhone" or "iCloud Drive".

このIDとパスワードは、FS!QRのシステムが自動的に生成するもの、または共有者: This ID and password are either automatically generated by the FS!QR system or custom-set by the sharer. For safety reasons, it is recommended to receive the sharing URL and the password through different channels (e.g. sending the URL via chat and conveying the password via phone or verbally). Entering the correct information and pressing the "Authenticate" button activates the download link.

FS!QRで共有されたファイルは、スマートフォンの標準カメラやQRコード読み取り: Files shared via FS!QR can be received instantly just by scanning the displayed code using your smartphone's standard camera or a QR code reader app. There is absolutely no need to install dedicated apps beforehand or register for membership (create an account) like with traditional file sharing services. Simply tap the displayed URL (link) to access the download screen immediately.
Google Chromeなどのブラウザを使用してダウンロードした場合、システム: If you download using a browser like Google Chrome, the files will be stored in the system's standard file management app.
カメラのレンズが汚れていないか、ピントが合っているかを確認してください。また、画: Please check if the camera lens is clean and focused. Also, if there is strong reflection on the screen, slightly tilt the smartphone or adjust the brightness of the room. On some older Android devices, you may need to use a dedicated QR code reader app instead of the standard camera.
ホーム画面から青いフォルダアイコンの「ファイル」アプリを起動します。: Launch the "Files" app with the blue folder icon from the home screen.
写真や動画の場合は、ダウンロード後にプレビュー画面で共有アイコン（左下の四角に上: In the case of photos or videos, after downloading, you can tap the share icon (the square with an up arrow at the bottom left) on the preview screen and select "Save Image" or "Save Video" to move them to the standard "Photos" app (camera roll).
写真や画像ファイルは、端末の「Google フォト」や「ギャラリー」アプリ内の「: Photos and image files can also be checked directly from the "Download" album inside the "Google Photos" or "Gallery" app on your device.
この手軽さは、個人間での写真や動画の受け渡しはもちろん、ビジネスでの会議資料の配: This ease of use brings a powerful advantage by reducing the burden on the recipient to zero in various scenes, including sharing photos and videos between individuals, distributing meeting materials in business, and handing out digital printouts in educational settings.
ブラウザの仕様によって、ダウンロードボタンを押した後にファイルがそのままブラウザ: Depending on browser specifications, files may open directly in the browser after pressing the download button. In such cases, select "Save Copy" or "Save File" from the browser menu, or save via the share menu.
ダウンロードしたファイルが「どこに保存されたか分からない」という問い合わせは、ス: Inquiries like "I don't know where the downloaded file was saved" are frequently received from users unfamiliar with smartphone operations. The destination folder varies depending on the OS, so please check using the steps below.

Safariブラウザのデフォルト設定では、ダウンロードしたファイルは内蔵の「ファ: In the Safari browser's default settings, downloaded files are saved in the "Downloads" folder within the built-in "Files" app.
大容量ファイルを受け取る際は、モバイル回線（4G/5G）の電波状況が不安定だとエ: When receiving large files, unstable signal reception on mobile networks (4G/5G) easily leads to errors. Please connect to a stable Wi-Fi environment, reload (refresh) the browser page, and try again.

スマートフォンの標準カメラアプリを起動し、共有元のパソコン画面や紙に印刷されたQ: Open your phone's standard camera app and point it at the QR code on the sender's PC screen or printed on paper.
ページ上に表示されたファイル名とサイズを確認し、「ダウンロード」ボタンをタップし: Check the file name and size shown on the page, then tap the "Download" button. When it finishes, the file is saved on your device.
画面上にポップアップ表示される黄色いリンク（または通知）をタップして、ブラウザで: Tap the yellow link (or notification) that pops up on screen to open the FS!QR download page in your browser.
